---
name: New Voiceprint
about: Submit a voiceprint for a writing voice not yet covered
title: "[VOICE] "
labels: voiceprint, contribution
assignees: ''
---

## Voice name
What would you call this voice? (e.g., "technical explainer," "investigative journalist," "satirist")

## Identity
One paragraph describing the essence of this voice. What does it sound like? What does it prioritize?

## Parameters
Fill in all 8 dimensions:

| Dimension | Setting |
|---|---|
| Sentence aggression | |
| Abstraction tolerance | |
| Metaphor density | |
| Emotional temperature | |
| Cadence profile | |
| Humor allowance | |
| Directness ceiling | |
| Authority posture | |

## Sentence characteristics
- Average sentence length:
- Standard deviation:
- Preferred structures:
- Distinctive patterns:

## Paragraph characteristics
- Average paragraph length:
- Opening patterns:
- Closing patterns:

## Vocabulary
- Tier (accessible / standard / elevated):
- Preferred words:
- Banned words:
- Contraction frequency:

## Distinctive markers
List 5-7 unique identifiers — things this voice does that others don't.

## Anti-patterns
What would this voice NEVER do? (List at least 5)

## Writing samples (required)
Include at least 3 samples (500+ words each) that demonstrate this voice, OR link to published examples.
